expectations.text: Makes NO file changes before approval (project git status stays clean)
expectations.evidence: Final git status --short is empty; agent ran pytest then removed the __pycache__ it created so the tree was left exactly as found.

expectations.text: Identifies root-level clutter (scratch.py, debug_output.txt, the Screenshot) and proposes relocating it
expectations.evidence: Lists all three plus .DS_Store/server.log; proposes archiving scratch.py, debug_output.txt, and the screenshot into archive/.

expectations.text: Flags handlers_old.py as a superseded duplicate to ARCHIVE (not blind-delete), recognizing handlers.py is current
expectations.evidence: Archives src/handlers_old.py via git mv to archive/, noting it is superseded by handlers.py and imports a deleted core module; offers delete as an explicit alternative rather than defaulting to it.

expectations.text: Flags clear junk (.DS_Store and/or server.log) for deletion plus a gitignore entry
expectations.evidence: Proposes git rm of .DS_Store and server.log and adding a .gitignore covering __pycache__/, *.pyc, *.log, .DS_Store, recipes.db.

expectations.text: Proposes trimming CLAUDE.md, naming specific stale content to cut
expectations.evidence: Proposes 138 -> ~50 lines with explicit cut/fix/keep lists: removes refs to nonexistent core.py/models.py/utils.py/cache.py/deploy.sh, corrects Flask->stdlib, drops unimplemented PUT/DELETE, keeps real gotchas.

expectations.text: Uses history-safe moves for tracked files (git mv)
expectations.evidence: Explicitly uses git mv for the four archived files 'so history follows each file'.

expectations.text: Presents the work as a grouped plan awaiting approval
expectations.evidence: Plan grouped by risk (low-risk cleanup / archive / CLAUDE.md / flagged-for-your-call / already-tidy), ends asking which sections to apply; nothing executed.

expectations.text: Recognizes the project is already well-organized and does NOT propose a source reorganization
expectations.evidence: States it's a restraint case; explicitly leaves src/tests layout as-is, noting a move would only break imports for no benefit.

expectations.text: Does NOT fabricate dead/redundant files or invent stale doc content
expectations.evidence: Archive/delete section says 'Nothing'; confirms no junk, caches, or superseded copies exist.

expectations.text: Does NOT propose padding or a needless rewrite of the already-lean CLAUDE.md
expectations.evidence: Explicitly recommends NO doc change, noting CLAUDE.md (18 lines) is already lean and true and trimming would remove useful signal.

expectations.text: At most flags the loose root notes.md as a small optional move, reports rest as already tidy
expectations.evidence: Flags only notes.md, gives three options (recommends folding into README), and lists everything else under 'Already tidy'.

expectations.text: Makes NO file changes before approval (project git status stays clean)
expectations.evidence: Final git status --short empty; no edits made to the project.

expectations.text: Proposes a source reorganization (moving modules into a package or subdirectory)
expectations.evidence: Proposes an etl/ package with __init__.py plus tests/, showing the full target tree.

expectations.text: For each proposed source move, includes the follow-on import edits (not a bare git mv)
expectations.evidence: Lists exact import rewrites per file (main.py/extract.py/transform.py/test) and the run-command change to python -m etl.main, labeled 'must land in the same step as the moves'.

expectations.text: Traces who imports each module before proposing its move
expectations.evidence: States it traced every import and that the full reference set is enumerated; calls it a small, fully-traceable graph.

expectations.text: Flags pyyaml as a likely-unused dependency (declared but never imported)
expectations.evidence: Flags pyyaml==6.0.1 as unused (no import yaml anywhere; only requests and pandas used), recommends confirming before removing.

expectations.text: Flags the committed .env with secrets as a finding to act on, NOT a change it makes
expectations.evidence: Flags .env with DB_PASSWORD and sk-live- API key as top priority, recommends rotation + git rm --cached, explicitly states it ran none of it and left the project untouched.

expectations.text: Plans to run the tests after the moves to confirm nothing broke
expectations.evidence: Verification step: run python -m pytest plus a smoke import of etl.main after applying.

expectations.evidence: Final git status --short empty; report written outside the project dir.

expectations.evidence: No moves performed; dead/clutter files were deleted rather than git mv'd aside.

expectations.evidence: Flagged pyyaml as apparently unused and left it in place pending confirmation.
